general.instructionsDescription: These instructions will be applied to all your conversations. Agent-specific instructions take higher priority.
general.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g., Always respond in Chinese. Prefer concise answers...
general.chooseAvatarDescription: Pick a color, then choose an icon — or upload your own image.
general.avatarPreviewHint: Pick a color and icon below.
general.invalidImageFormat: Invalid image format. Supported: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
general.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters
general.usernameCooldown: Username can only be changed once every 7 days. Please try again in {days} days.
general.usernameChangeConfirmDescription: Once changed, your username will be locked for 7 days. Make sure this is the name you want.
general.personalizationDescription: Re-run the setup wizard to update your role, projects, and AI preferences.
general.timezoneDescription: Set your default timezone for scheduled tasks and timestamps.
general.chatDefaultsDescription: Configure default settings for new conversations.
general.extendedThinkingDescription: Enable extended reasoning for more thorough responses.
general.extendedThinkingSaveFailed: Failed to save extended thinking preference

models.title: Model Providers
models.description: Configure LLM providers. General model is used for reasoning and planning; Fast model for DAG step execution.
models.noProvidersHint: Add a provider to override the environment variable defaults.
models.generalModelDesc: Used for ReAct reasoning, DAG planning, and analysis
models.fastModelDesc: Used for DAG step execution (falls back to General if not set)
models.noProvidersAvailable: No providers available. Add a provider first.
models.compatibilityNotice: Only OpenAI-compatible APIs are supported. For Anthropic or other providers, use their OpenAI-compatible endpoint and API key.
models.apiKeyEditPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep existing key
models.apiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the existing key.
models.nameAndModelRequired: Name and Model Name are required
models.discardDescription: You have unsaved input. Are you sure you want to close?
models.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.

account.connectedAccountsDescription: Third-party login providers linked to your account.
account.disconnectTooltip: Set a password before disconnecting your only login method.
account.disconnectConfirmDescription: This will unlink your {provider} account. You can reconnect it later from the settings page.
account.connectFailed: Failed to initiate OAuth connection. Please try again.
account.disconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect provider. Please try again.
account.bindErrorEmailMismatch: OAuth account email does not match your account email. Binding requires matching emails.
account.bindErrorAlreadyBound: This OAuth account is already bound to another user.
account.bindErrorAlreadyConnected: You already have a connection for this provider.
account.bindErrorFeishuEmailRequired: Your Feishu account has no verified email. Please add one in Feishu settings before linking.
account.emailDescription: The email address associated with your account.
account.changeEmailDescription: Enter your new email address and current password to initiate the change.
account.changeEmailCodeSent: A verification code has been sent to your new email address.
account.changeEmailInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
account.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters.
account.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
account.setPasswordDescription: Your account uses OAuth login only. Set a password to enable email/password login and allow disconnecting OAuth providers.
account.passwordSetFailed: Failed to set password. Please try again.
account.resetCodeSent: A verification code has been sent to {email}
account.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
account.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account with TOTP-based two-factor authentication.
account.setupTwoFactorDescription: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
account.twoFactorEnableFailed: Failed to enable 2FA. Please check your code and try again.
account.twoFactorSetupFailed: Failed to set up 2FA. Please try again.
account.backupCodesWarning: Save these backup codes in a secure place. Each code can only be used once. They will not be shown again.
account.regenerateBackupCodesConfirm: This will invalidate all existing backup codes and generate new ones.
account.disableTwoFactorDescription: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication. This will reduce your account security.
account.disableTwoFactorFailed: Failed to disable 2FA. Please check your password.
account.sessionsDescription: Recent login attempts and active sessions for your account.
account.sessionsRevokeAllConfirmDescription: This will end all sessions except your current one. You will need to sign in again on those devices.
account.sessionsRevokeAllSuccess: All other sessions have been revoked
account.dataExportDescription: Download all your data including profile, conversations, agents, and settings as a JSON file.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Once deleted, all your data will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
account.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The following data will be permanently deleted:

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how the app looks on your device.
appearance.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Quick reference for keyboard shortcuts available throughout the application.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage your personal API keys for programmatic access.
apiKeys.activeBanner: API keys are now active! Use them to authenticate API requests programmatically. <link>View API Reference →</link>
apiKeys.keyCreatedWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
apiKeys.toggleActiveFailed: Failed to update API key status
apiKeys.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this API key. Any integrations using this key will stop working.

credentials.title: My Credentials
credentials.description: View and manage your connector and MCP server credentials.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Monitor your token usage and quota.
usage.noUsageData: No usage data available for this period.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how you want to be notified about important events.
notifications.comingSoonBanner: Notification delivery is coming soon. Configure your preferences now so they are ready.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Resources you have subscribed to from the Market.
subscriptions.unsubscribeConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from "{name}"? You can re-subscribe from the Market at any time.
subscriptions.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions yet. Browse the Market to discover shared resources.
